title: Functional Core, Imperative Shell, and Production Integration · Pipeline Foundry
summary: Rebuild an unreliable data-processing service as a pure decision core with explicit operational effects. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a production-shaped functional service and decision record while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate pure domain decisions from I/O orchestration with explicit data contracts.
Pass clocks, randomness, storage, and transport behavior through narrow callable interfaces.
Compose ingestion, validation, transformation, aggregation, and emission with bounded resource use.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""

from collections.abc import Callable, Iterable, Iterator
from functools import partial, reduce
from itertools import chain, islice
from typing import TypeVar

T = TypeVar('T')
U = TypeVar('U')
